title: gutenbergia cordifolia var. glanduliflora
intro: Gutenbergia cordifolia var. glanduliflora, also known as the glandular-leaved Gutenbergia, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae, characterized by its heart-shaped leaves and glandular flowers. Traditionally, the plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Gutenbergia cordifolia var. glanduliflora include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, with recommended doses and preparation methods varying depending on the specific application and cultural traditions.
